This is an example of a berry tree that works like the
ones from generation 2, this page uses the day sprite
for the tree. You can change the type of berry from
the second text and the script command.

ones from generation 2, this page uses the night
sprite for the tree. You can change the type of berry
from the second text and the script command.

sprite graphic for the tree in day time.
Just like in page 2, you have to put the same
